name: Prompt / Proofread
text: Proofread the following text for spelling and grammar, improving clarity and tone:

name: Prompt / Summarize
text: Summarize the following in clear bullet points. Lead with the most important takeaway.

name: Email / Follow Up
text: Just following up on my previous message — happy to answer any questions or find a time to connect.

name: Email / OOO
text: I am out of the office and will return on [date]. For urgent matters, please contact [name] at [email].
